query:

ADD COLUMN stripeCustomerId VARCHAR(64),
ADD COLUMN stripeSubscriptionId VARCHAR(64),
ADD COLUMN subscriptionStatus ENUM('active', 'canceled', 'past_due', 'unpaid', 'trialing'),
ADD COLUMN currentPeriodStart TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN currentPeriodEnd TIMESTAMP NULL;
